error_signature: No response body will be returned by default
title: Missing ID in POST response from Supabase
symptom: After a successful POST request to Supabase, the response does not include the newly created record's ID, leading to confusion about accessing it.
applies_when: Making a POST request to create a new record
not_this_if: The POST request includes the Prefer header to return the representation
root_cause: By default, Supabase does not return the created record's ID in the response body after a successful POST request. To receive the full created object, including the ID, a specific HTTP header must be included in the request.
fix_steps: Modify the POST request to include the header 'Prefer: return=representation'.
Send the modified request to create the new record.
Check the response to confirm that the newly created record's ID is included.
agent_instruction: Include the Prefer header in your POST request to receive the full created object in the response.
